channel.title: Experience on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Experience on yexca'Blog

item.title: 2024 PC Setup Log
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Introduction I recently reinstalled my OS after swapping out some drives. When I pulled out my ancient setup USB drive, the software inside was pretty outdated—some wouldn’t even run on a modern system, and for others, I’ve found better alternatives. I’m writing this article to document the software I used for this 2024 build.

item.title: Cannot Login to Typecho Admin via HTTPS
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Introduction After migrating Typecho to a Docker container, enabling HTTPS caused errors when trying to log into the admin panel. It worked fine over HTTP. Since my previous non-Docker deployment didn’t have this issue, I initially suspected a Docker networking problem. At the time, I only needed to make a one-off update, so I just disabled HTTPS, finished the changes, and left it. Now that I’m using Typecho again and …

item.title: Fix "Bad credentials" Error When Uploading Images with PicX
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction While writing a post today, I found that PicX was no longer working and showed a Bad credentials error. Here is how to fix it. Solution The issue is simply that your GitHub Token has expired. You should have received an email titled [GitHub] Your personal access token has expired. The email contains three lines. Look for the second line starting with If this token is still needed, click the link provided, and …

item.title: Weibo Video Downloader
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview First, find the video you want to download (obviously). Copy the link highlighted in the box below. Next, open the video downloader site , paste the link, and click “Parse Video/Image” (complete any verification as prompted). Then, just click “Download Video”. // This post is a bit filler.
